details.test: Task 1 - add two washable 5x7 living room rugs with filters to cart
Task 2 - compare three rugs and wishlist the highest-rated one
Task 3 - buy three rugs under total budget with rating filter
Task 4 - find cheapest 5x7 colored living room rug and add to cart
Task 5 - select mid-priced modern 5x7 rug and add to wishlist
Task 6 - buy 9x12 living room rug with free returns and proceed to shipping options
Task 7 - configure 5x7 blue rug quantity 2 in cart and verify totals
Task 8 - use recently viewed to revisit a searched rug and save for later
Task 9 - save multiple rugs under price and rating thresholds to wishlist
